zh.lifeSummary: 當Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandilo於1120年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾時，她的父親Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth39歲，母親Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd20歲。她於1133年與Ifor Bach ap Meurig Fychan of Plâs Ifor在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根澤德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1197年在英國威爾斯享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandilo于1120年出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾时，她的父亲Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth39岁，母亲Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd20岁。她于1133年与Ifor Bach ap Meurig Fychan of Plâs Ifor在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根澤德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1197年在英国威尔斯享年77岁。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Nest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of Nest, a Welsh pet form of Agnes ; the name of the grandmother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’).

en.lifeSummary: When Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandilo was born in 1120, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth, was 39 and her mother, Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd, was 20. She married Ifor Bach ap Meurig Fychan of Plâs Ifor in 1133, in Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1197, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandilo est née en 1120, à Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Ifor Bach ap Meurig Fychan of Plâs Ifor en 1133, à Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1197, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandilo 1120 in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth 39 und ihre Mutter Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd 20. Sie hat 1133 in Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom Ifor Bach ap Meurig Fychan of Plâs Ifor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1197 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandilo è nata il nel 1120 nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Ifor Bach ap Meurig Fychan of Plâs Ifor nel 1133, nel Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1197, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandiloが1120年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarthは39歳，母Gwenllian ferch Gruffyddは20歳であった。1133年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンセングヘニーッドでIfor Bach ap Meurig Fychan of Plâs Iforと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1197年にイギリスウェールズで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandilo(이)가 1120년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1133년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 센게이니드에서 Ifor Bach ap Meurig Fychan of Plâs Ifor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1197년 영국 웨일스에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandilo nasceu em 1120, em Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Ifor Bach ap Meurig Fychan of Plâs Ifor em 1133, em Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1197, em Gales, United Kingdom, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandilo родилась в 1120 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ifor Bach ap Meurig Fychan of Plâs Ifor в 1133 г. в местности сеньхенидд, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1197 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nest verch Gruffydd of Llandilo nació en 1120, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Ifor Bach ap Meurig Fychan of Plâs Ifor en 1133, en Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1197, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años.
